description: Your TiddlyWiki contains 15 development task tiddlers for three software projects (ProjectAlpha, ProjectBeta, ProjectGamma). Each task tiddler is tagged with exactly one status tag: 'Todo', 'InProgress', or 'Done'. Create a new tiddler titled "Project Dashboard" tagged with 'Dashboard' that acts as a dynamic dashboard. The dashboard must feature three sections with wikitext headings for 'Todo', 'InProgress', and 'Done'. In each section, use the <$list> widget to dynamically display all tiddlers with that status as clickable links and the <$count> widget to show the total number of items in that category. Ensure the dashboard uses dynamic filters rather than hardcoded titles.
